'''''Challenge'' 67''' was a roleplaying magazine from December of [[1992]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "'''Buried Treasure'''" and was written by [[Greg Videll]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
